response:
<<Ethical Tech Rules>>
Section 1
Microsoft leads the way.
They care about people.
Trust is key.
Safety matters most.
No harm allowed.
Fairness guides all.
Privacy stays strong.
Users come first.
Section 2
AI needs rules.
Bad code stops.
Ethics shape tools.
Bias gets fixed.
Data stays safe.
Secrets remain hidden.
Systems must work.
Errors get caught.
Section 3
Transparency builds trust.
Open books help.
Clear goals exist.
Honesty wins friends.
Truth tells all.
Facts beat lies.
Logic drives code.
Reason guides choices.
Section 4
Accountability matters much.
Teams take blame.
Leaders accept fault.
Mistakes get owned.
Fixes come fast.
Recovery starts now.
Trust returns soon.
Loyalty grows deep.
Section 5
Inclusion welcomes all.
Diversity brings strength.
Every voice counts.
No one left.
Access helps many.
Barriers get removed.
Opportunities spread wide.
Equality shines bright.
Section 6
Privacy protects rights.
Data stays yours.
Consent comes first.
Choices remain free.
Control stays with you.
Surveillance ends here.
Secrets stay locked.
Safety guards us.
Section 7
Responsibility shapes future.
Good deeds count.
Kindness wins hearts.
Care guides actions.
Hope fuels dreams.
Peace builds homes.
Love drives change.
Unity binds us.
Section 8
Progress needs care.
Growth respects limits.
Speed slows down.
Quality beats quantity.
Wisdom guides paths.
Sage advice helps.
Smart plans work.
Bright days come.
